title: Simplify drawer — remove Markets and Signals tabs
objective: The details drawer has 6 tabs: Trade Log, Shadow, Candidates, Markets, Signals, Manual. Markets and Signals are rarely useful at a glance and add visual noise. Remove them to simplify to 4 essential tabs.
prerequisite: DASH_004 must be complete (same file — no concurrent edits)
inputs: dashboard.html — drawer tab-nav around line 420-426: 6 tab buttons
dashboard.html — tab panels: tab-trades, tab-shadow, tab-candidates, tab-markets, tab-signals, tab-manual
dashboard.html — JS that populates markets-list and signals-list
deliverables: Remove tab button for Markets: <button class='tab-btn' onclick="switchTab('markets',this)">Markets</button>
Remove tab button for Signals: <button class='tab-btn' onclick="switchTab('signals',this)">Signals</button>
Remove <div id='tab-markets' class='tab-panel'> and its contents
Remove <div id='tab-signals' class='tab-panel'> and its contents
Remove JS render calls for markets and signals (renderMarkets(), renderSignals() or equivalent)
Remove fetch calls for /api/markets and /api/signals if they exist in the polling loop
Keep: Trade Log, Shadow, Candidates, Manual tabs intact and functional
acceptance_criteria: Drawer shows exactly 4 tabs: Trade Log, Shadow, Candidates, Manual
No Markets or Signals tab visible
Trade Log, Shadow, Candidates, Manual tabs all render their content correctly
No JS errors in browser console from missing markets/signals render targets
verification: Open http://localhost:5000, open drawer (hamburger menu) — exactly 4 tabs visible
